359.issue_title: ServerSettings.version is configureerbaar maar mag dat niet zijn

cycles.name: C1: @computed_field + extra='forbid' on ServerSettings

deliverables.description: ServerSettings.version is a @computed_field — passing version= to the constructor raises Pydantic ValidationError
ServerSettings has model_config = ConfigDict(extra='forbid') — any unknown key in constructor raises ValidationError
_default_server_version() is called via the computed property; importlib.metadata mock in test_settings.py controls the returned value
test_load_from_env passes via MCP run_tests (no longer affected by MCP_CONFIG_PATH loading mcp_config.yaml with version: '1.0.0')
test_load_from_yaml fixture verified — version: key absent or removed if present
version: key removed from docs/mcp_server/ARCHITECTURE.md documented YAML example
mcp_config.yaml version: key removal documented (operator responsibility; file is in .gitignore)
All tests in tests/mcp_server/unit/config/test_settings.py and tests/mcp_server/unit/test_cli.py green
Quality gates pass on changed files (Ruff format, Ruff lint, Pyright, line length)

cycles.exit_criteria: All 10 deliverables satisfied: @computed_field in place, extra='forbid' active, both previously-failing tests pass via MCP run_tests, ARCHITECTURE.md updated, test fixtures clean, quality gates green.
